name: Sabrina Poderis
aboutMe:
- I am a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on process organization and documentation.
- Experience with React, React Native, and TypeScript.
- Special interest in frontend, but with solid experience in backend and mobile, constantly expanding knowledge in the field.
- Skills in communication, collaboration, and continuous learning, always seeking to optimize productivity and quality in software development.
contactDescription: Would you like to get in touch? Send me a message and I will get back to you as soon as possible!

alt.profileImage: Profile picture of Sabrina Poderis. I am a woman of mixed-race, wearing black glasses and my hair is dyed blonde.

experiences.description:
I worked on developing solutions for web and mobile platforms using React.js and React Native, focusing on scalability, code quality, and process optimization.
- I was the main person responsible for controlling and maintaining a website for a premium product aimed at personalized genetic testing, helping identify diseases and recommending the most effective medications for each patient. Besides development, I held frequent alignments with the PO and stakeholders to ensure product evolution.
- I actively contributed to supporting and evolving the Meu Einstein app, including updating a project with outdated libraries to more modern versions, ensuring compatibility between React and Flutter. I also worked with native code and implemented feature flags for controlled rollouts of new features.
- I migrated from the patient area to the medical schedule, where I developed several strategic features to optimize the platform usage by secretaries and doctors. This process included integration with other scheduling services, ensuring a connected and efficient ecosystem.
- My major achievement in this new area was integrating the documentation culture, bringing both technical and business refinement to work items. The impact was positive, resulting in excellent feedback from colleagues and superiors. I am now focused on further enhancing this initiative, expanding it to changelogs and wikis within the team.

I worked on the development and maintenance of systems for a CRM integrated with a POS (Point of Sale) system, focused on solutions for the retail and management sectors.
- Support and evolution of Laravel applications and legacy PHP systems 
- Development of new features to optimize CRM operational workflows
- Technical documentation for standardization and improvement of internal processes
.- In addition to technical activities, I worked in a small team of five people, where I had the opportunity to work with a legacy framework that I mastered, ensuring the stability and evolution of applications.

I worked on developing scripts for automating BPO processes and providing support for legacy PHP systems in a company specializing in fiscal services.
It was during this experience that I began learning about software documentation. The company had no detailed records of systems, and the framework introduction was exclusively through videos. As a result, I started documenting everything I learned. My boss approved the initiative, and later the material became internal and was even shared among colleagues.

college.name: Fatec São Caetano do Sul - Antônio Russo

projects.name: Detran SP Practice Exam
projects.description: The Detran SP Practice Exam application was developed with the purpose of simulating the Detran theoretical exam. It allows users to practice official questions and test their knowledge on traffic laws, defensive driving, first aid, and basic mechanics.

recommendations.name: Caio Pereira Mascarenhas
recommendations.text: I had the pleasure of working with Sabrina, and I can say that she is an extremely committed and inquisitive professional. She always seeks to understand the purpose of what she is developing, contributing ideas and improvements at every stage of the project. Her involvement goes beyond the code: she cares about the impact of the final product and is always willing to make things happen. She is a professional who adds great value and makes a difference in the team!

recommendations.name: Yan Victor Chaves Pinheiro
recommendations.text: Sabrina is an excellent professional who always faced the challenges presented to her with great competence. I learned a lot from her. She is also a very organized and motivated person who never shied away from a challenge, and working with her was truly rewarding.

recommendations.name: Alessandro L. Menezes
recommendations.text: I highly recommend Sabrina. Working with her was a transformative experience: her relaxed approach to challenges makes the environment lighter while maintaining seriousness and precision when necessary. I had the opportunity to learn a lot about project organization alongside the most organized person I have ever worked with. Her curiosity in learning and testing new technologies continuously raises the level of our projects. Sabrina is, without a doubt, an inspiring professional and a great asset to any team.

recommendations.name: Tiffany Cordeiro
recommendations.text: Working with Sabrina was an incredible experience! She is extremely organized, always keeping everything in order and ensuring that work flows in the best possible way. Additionally, her willingness to help makes all the difference in daily tasks—she is the kind of person who is always ready to collaborate and create a lighter, more productive environment. Without a doubt, a professional who adds great value to any team!

recommendations.name: Amanda Mastrodomenico
recommendations.text: Sabrina is a developer committed to delivering results on time and determined to overcome her own challenges, taking on tasks beyond her comfort zone. She communicates clearly and objectively, easily explaining technical issues at a business level. During the time we worked together, she was very dedicated to documenting processes and workflows, ensuring that the entire team had visibility into what was done and how!
